title: cleome viscosa f. deglabrata
intro: Cleome viscosa f. deglabrata is a variant of the plant Cleome viscosa, commonly known as the "tassel flower" or "cat's whiskers." This plant is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cleome viscosa f. deglabrata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites and other venomous bites. Cleome viscosa f. deglabrata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda, as a remedy for various ailments.
